error.networkDescription: Please check your network connection and try again
error.serverDescription: The server encountered an error while processing your request
error.clientDescription: There was an issue with your request
error.validationDescription: Please check your input and try again
error.unauthorizedDescription: You don't have permission to access this resource
error.notFoundDescription: The requested resource was not found

monitor.title: Monitor Dashboard
monitor.noDataDescription: No data found for the current time range. Please try adjusting the filter conditions or selecting a different time range.

metrics.totalRequestsTooltip: Total number of requests in the time range
metrics.errorCountTooltip: Number of exception requests in the time range
metrics.usedAmountTooltip: Total used amount in the time range
metrics.serviceTierFlexTooltip: Requests using Flex service tier (lower priority, lower cost)
metrics.serviceTierPriorityTooltip: Requests using Priority service tier (higher priority, higher cost)
metrics.maxRpmTooltip: Maximum requests per minute in the time range
metrics.maxTpmTooltip: Maximum tokens per minute in the time range
metrics.totalTokensTooltip: Total tokens consumed in the time range
metrics.totalInputTokensTooltip: Total input-side tokens in the time range, including text, image, audio, cached, and cache creation tokens.
metrics.totalInputAmountTooltip: Total input-side cost in the time range, including text, image, audio, cached, and cache creation costs.
metrics.totalOutputTokensTooltip: Total output-side tokens in the time range, including text and image output tokens.
metrics.totalOutputAmountTooltip: Total output-side cost in the time range, including text and image output costs.
metrics.outputTokensTooltip: Total output tokens in the time range
metrics.cacheHitCountTooltip: Number of requests that hit cache in the time range
metrics.cachedTokensTooltip: Tokens served from cache in the time range
metrics.webSearchCountTooltip: Number of web searches performed in the time range

login.title: Login to Admin Panel
login.description: Please enter your access token to login
login.keepSafe: Please keep your access token safe
login.feishuLoginDesc: Sign in with your Feishu account

feishuCallback.noCode: Missing authorization code, please initiate Feishu login again

dashboard.title: Enterprise Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Track department adoption, spend concentration, and model mix in one place.
dashboard.noHighlights: No standout data in the current selection.
dashboard.modelDistributionHint: Compare the models taking the largest share of requests and spend.

myAccess.title: My Access
myAccess.baseUrlHint: See channel-specific endpoint URLs in the model list below
myAccess.baseUrlRegionWarning: Choose the endpoint URL matching the region of the model you're using
myAccess.baseUrlRegionHint: Use domestic URL for PPIO models, overseas URL for overseas models
myAccess.createKeyHint: Copy and save now. This key will only be shown once.
myAccess.disableKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable this key? This cannot be undone.
myAccess.noKeys: No API Keys yet. Click the button above to create one.
myAccess.modelsApiHint: Returns all available models with pricing, capabilities, and rate limits. Agents can call this periodically to optimize model selection. Requires API Key authentication.
myAccess.anthropicNote: Note: Anthropic SDK base_url should NOT include /v1 suffix
myAccess.quotaIndependentHint: Real-time status, not affected by time filter

ppio.title: PPIO Model Sync
ppio.description: Sync PPIO model configurations to local database
ppio.configNoChannels: No PPIO channels found. Please create a PPIO channel in Channel Management first.
ppio.directApiKeyHint: First-time setup: Enter your PPIO API Key. Channels will be created automatically during sync.
ppio.diagnosticHint: Click "Refresh Diagnostic" to check model differences
ppio.deleteUnmatchedHint: Will delete local models that no longer exist on PPIO
ppio.anthropicPurePassthroughHint: Forward Anthropic requests verbatim without any protocol conversion
ppio.allowPassthroughUnknownHint: When enabled, requests for models not in the model list are routed to this channel as a fallback at zero cost
ppio.sharedHint: These models are maintained by another provider. They will be included in this provider's channel model list after sync.
ppio.mgmtTokenDescription: Paste your PPIO management console token to enable syncing of closed-source models (pa/ prefix, e.g. Claude, GPT, Gemini)
ppio.mgmtTokenConfigured: Management token is configured (full model catalog enabled)
ppio.mgmtTokenHint: Log in to ppio.com and copy the token from your browser (Network tab → any API request → Authorization header). This enables access to 121 models including closed-source pa/ models.
ppio.uncoveredHint: The following models are synced but not assigned to any Channel, so they won't appear in My Access. Re-running sync should fix this automatically.

novita.title: Overseas Model Sync
novita.description: Sync overseas provider model configurations to local database
novita.configNoChannels: No overseas channels found. Please create an overseas channel in Channel Management first.
novita.directApiKeyHint: First-time setup: Enter your overseas API Key. Channels will be created automatically during sync.
novita.diagnosticHint: Click "Refresh Diagnostic" to check model differences
novita.deleteUnmatchedHint: Will delete local models that no longer exist on the overseas provider
novita.anthropicPurePassthroughHint: Forward Anthropic requests verbatim without any protocol conversion
novita.allowPassthroughUnknownHint: When enabled, requests for models not in the model list are routed to this channel as a fallback at zero cost
novita.sharedHint: These models are maintained by another provider. They will be included in this provider's channel model list after sync.
novita.mgmtTokenDescription: Paste your overseas provider management console token to enable syncing of closed-source models (e.g. Claude, GPT, Gemini)
novita.mgmtTokenConfigured: Management token is configured (full model catalog enabled)
novita.mgmtTokenHint: Log in to the overseas provider (novita.ai) management console and copy the token from your browser (Network tab → any API request → Authorization header). This enables access to the full model catalog including closed-source models.
novita.uncoveredHint: The following models are synced but not assigned to any Channel, so they won't appear in My Access. Re-running sync should fix this automatically.
novita.exchangeRateDescription: Overseas model prices are in USD. Set the exchange rate to convert to CNY during sync.
novita.exchangeRateInvalid: Please enter a valid exchange rate (greater than 0)

customReport.title: Custom Report
customReport.description: Build flexible analytics reports by selecting dimensions and measures
customReport.noData: No data available. Try adjusting your selections or time range.

templates.title: Quick Start
templates.deptCostTop10Desc: Spot the highest-spend departments first, then compare request volume and active users for scale context.
templates.deptCostStructureDesc: Review total spend alongside cache and reasoning cost share to understand department cost structure.
templates.modelCostEfficiencyDesc: Compare per-request cost, per-1K token cost, and total spend to find expensive models.
templates.modelUsageTrendDesc: Track requests, tokens, and spend by model over time to identify growth and replacement trends.
templates.userActivityRankDesc: Rank the most active users by requests, spend, model breadth, and success rate.
templates.deptAdoptionTrendDesc: Use requests, active users, and requests per active user to understand overall adoption momentum.
templates.deptModelPivotDesc: Compare how departments distribute usage and spend across different models.
templates.dailyPerformanceDesc: Monitor daily volume, average latency, success rate, and error rate in one view.
templates.modelStabilityWatchDesc: Compare success rate, error rate, and latency across models to spot unstable ones quickly.
templates.retryThrottleTrendDesc: Track retry, throttle, and exception rates over time to diagnose peaks or upstream instability.

customReport.deleteTemplateConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this template?
customReport.emptyState: Select dimensions and measures to auto-generate a report
customReport.chartInspectorHint: Hover a specific bar or point to inspect only the active metric.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Manage Feishu tenants allowed to access the system
accessControl.wildcardModeDescription: When enabled, any Feishu tenant can login (recommended for dev/test)
accessControl.envOverrideDescription: When enabled, use FEISHU_ALLOWED_TENANTS environment variable first
accessControl.wildcardEnabledDescription: All Feishu tenants are currently allowed. To restrict access, disable this and add allowed tenants.
accessControl.addTenantDescription: Add a new Feishu tenant to the whitelist
accessControl.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this tenant? Users from this organization will not be able to login.
accessControl.tenantIdHint: Find the Enterprise Key in Feishu developer console under App Credentials, or copy it from a rejected login record

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage Feishu users, roles, and quota policies
users.name: Name
users.assignQuotaDescription: Assign a quota policy to this user (overrides department policy)
users.permissionWarning: Some users are missing name/email. Please check Feishu app permissions.
users.reactivateConfirm: Confirm reactivating user {name}? This will restore their account access and re-enable their API keys.

quota.title: Quota Policy Management
quota.description: Configure progressive quota policies that auto-adjust RPM/TPM limits based on usage
quota.tier1RatioDesc: Use tier 1 limits when usage is below this ratio
quota.tier2RatioDesc: Use tier 2 limits when usage is below this ratio, tier 3 otherwise
quota.blockAtTier3Desc: Reject requests instead of throttling when usage reaches tier 3
quota.blockedModelsHint: One model per line, supports wildcard *
quota.priceBlockingHint: OR with blocked models — either match triggers blocking (¥/1K tokens, 0 = disabled)
quota.name: Name
quota.formDescription: Configure tier thresholds and RPM/TPM multipliers
quota.ratioError: Tier 1 threshold must be less than tier 2 threshold
quota.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete policy "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

notif.enableDesc: When enabled, users will receive Feishu P2P messages when their quota reaches each tier threshold
notif.exhaustDesc: Triggered when quota is exhausted and requests are rejected
notif.noP2PWarning: Feishu P2P not configured (requires FEISHU_APP_ID and FEISHU_APP_SECRET), notifications will not be sent

notifications.title: Notifications & Alerts
notifications.description: Configure quota usage notification templates and view alert history
notifications.enableDesc: Send Feishu P2P messages when users reach quota thresholds
notifications.p2pUnavailable: Feishu P2P notifications unavailable. Please check app configuration (requires FEISHU_APP_ID and FEISHU_APP_SECRET)
notifications.adminAlertEnableDesc: Notify admins via Feishu Webhook when a member's usage reaches the configured threshold
notifications.adminAlertThresholdDesc: Alert threshold (notify admins when member usage reaches this percentage)
notifications.policyChangeLabel: Policy Change Notification (when quota policy is adjusted)

permissions.title: Permission Settings
permissions.description: Configure view and manage permissions for each role

dialog.createDescription: Create a new API access key
dialog.name: Name

deleteDialog.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this API Key? This action cannot be undone.

quota.title: Quota Configuration
quota.description: Configure usage quotas for this token
quota.totalHelp: Set total usage quota, 0 means unlimited
quota.periodHelp: Set usage quota for each period
quota.periodTypeDisabledHelp: Period type is only needed when a period quota is set

dialog.createDescription: Add a new model to the system
dialog.ownerDescription: Used only for display and search filtering. It can be empty and can contain any characters.
dialog.forceSaveDetailDescription: Always persist request details for this model, even when the default detail-saving policy would skip them.
dialog.requestBodyStorageMaxSizePlaceholder: Enter 0 to use the global default, or a negative number to disable storage
dialog.requestBodyStorageMaxSizeDescription: Maximum stored size for request body details. `0` uses the global default value. A negative number means the request body detail will not be stored.
dialog.responseBodyStorageMaxSizePlaceholder: Enter 0 to use the global default, or a negative number to disable storage
dialog.responseBodyStorageMaxSizeDescription: Maximum stored size for response body details. `0` uses the global default value. A negative number means the response body detail will not be stored.
dialog.recordServiceTierDescription: Track service tier breakdown in summary data for this model, such as flex and priority.
dialog.recordClaudeLongContextDescription: Track an extra summary bucket only when the model is Claude and input tokens are greater than 200,000.
dialog.modelNameUpdateDisabled: Model name cannot be modified in update mode

config.title: Model Display Config
config.description: Configure descriptive display fields for the model
config.note: This section is for frontend display and notes only. It does not affect actual model behavior.
config.toolChoiceDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model supports tool choice.
config.visionDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model supports image or vision input.
config.coderDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model is oriented toward coding use cases.
config.limitedTimeFreeDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model is currently free in a promotion.
config.supportFormatsPlaceholder: One format per line, for example mp3
config.supportFormatsDescription: Enter one supported format per line. Useful for speech or audio model display.
config.supportVoicesPlaceholder: One voice per line, for example zh_female_cancan_mars_bigtts
config.supportVoicesDescription: Enter one supported voice per line. Useful for TTS model display.
config.extrasJsonPlaceholder: Enter a JSON object for extra display fields, for example {"custom_tag": true}
config.extrasJsonDescription: Use this to preserve or add config fields that do not have dedicated controls above. Must be a JSON object.
config.extrasJsonInvalid: Extra display fields JSON is invalid
config.extrasJsonObjectError: Extra display fields must be a JSON object

dialog.noSearchEngineConfigured: Click "Add Search Engine" to configure search engines
dialog.pluginConfigurationDescription: Configure optional plugins for this model

cachePlugin.description: Enable response caching to improve performance

webSearchPlugin.title: Web Search Plugin
webSearchPlugin.description: Enable web search capabilities for enhanced responses

engineSpec.baseUrlOptionalHelp: When left empty, the provider's default URL will be used

thinkSplitPlugin.title: Think Split Plugin
thinkSplitPlugin.description: Split complex thinking into structured responses

streamFakePlugin.title: Stream Fake Plugin
streamFakePlugin.description: Convert non-streaming requests to streaming responses for better user experience
